title: Conditional status changes on Work Management
excerpt: This feature already exists on the CRM Product. It is a very useful and basic upgrade. Now please take it and implement it in other products like Project or Work management. No brainer. Works on CRM and is needed in othe…

posts.author: WilliamdR (Willliam del Rivero)
posts.cookedHtml:
This feature already exists on the CRM Product. It is a very useful and basic upgrade. Now please take it and implement it in other products like Project or Work management. No brainer. Works on CRM and is needed in other aspects.
Thanks.

posts.author: mharvey (Meegan Harvey)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be very welcome in our project management boards!

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@WilliamdR @mharvey I’m happy to announce that conditional Status Changes are now live across all monday products! Check out Conditional Status Smart Column - add conditions such as mandatory columns, assigned person or team prior statuses for enforcing conditional logic to monday.com boards

See a demo below

posts.author: WilliamdR (Willliam del Rivero)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nir-Jetpack Thank you for the update, really looking forward to this upgrade, I can think on a couple of instances where I am going to implement this straight away!

So far, I cannot see the “column extension” option on status columns on any of my boards on Work Management or Projects Product. Is this going to be a paid feature? We are on an enterprise plan, we should have access to this feature if it has been already deployed?
Cheer

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. This should already be live for all monday customers. Can you share privately your account URL to appsupport@jetpackwork.com

posts.author: vmccoy (V)
posts.cookedHtml:
This 100% is needed across all products. There is no way this is only needed for CRMs. In fact we moved from CRM to Work Management because we are more project focused and various project data points need updating once a task is marked as complete… having a conditional allows for those points to pop up and for staff to check final items before the status is final. This reduced data errors and mental stress on our team to remember the various data updates across different project types.

PLEASE expand this feature! It is critical for smooth workflows.

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @vmccoy there is actually a way to get this in WM and other products as well, there’s a marketplace app named Workflow (different functionality the Mondays workflow center) and it allow you setting required column per step, visual step by step flow and also permission per step. You can try for free:

Workflow - monday.com Marketplace Workflow - monday.com Marketplace
